/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_swap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_min_index_of_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_copy_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_make_sorted.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_get_sorted.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_parse_args.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SortingTesting.dir/test_helpers.cpp.o -o SortingTesting  ../src/libSortingSrc.a ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgmock.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../_deps/rapidcheck-build/librapidcheck.a ../lib/libgtest.a
